name: Philly 3-step Fruit Topped Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth.
2. Add sugar and vanilla extract; continue beating until well combined.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time until mixture is blended.
4. Pour the batter into a prepared graham cracker crust (6 oz or 9").
5. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes, or until the center is nearly set.
6. Allow to cool completely.
7. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours, or overnight.
8. Top with sliced fresh fruit before serving.
Serves: 8-10
